title: sunania virginiana var. glaberrima
intro: Sunania virginiana var. glaberrima is a plant species that belongs to the mint family, Lamiaceae, and is native to North America. It is also known as American pennyroyal, a perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties and health benefits for centuries. The plant contains carvone and limonene, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and skin conditions. Traditionally, American pennyroyal is prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever reduction, wound healing, and insect repellency.
